title: VibePod Data Explorer
description: Datasette UI for VibePod session logs and HTTP proxy traffic.

logs.title: Session Logs
logs.description: Interactive sessions and submitted messages captured by VibePod.

recent_sessions.title: Recent sessions
recent_sessions.sql: SELECT s.id, s.started_at, s.ended_at, s.agent, s.container_name, s.exit_reason, COUNT(m.id) AS message_count FROM sessions s LEFT JOIN messages m ON m.session_id = s.id GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.started_at DESC LIMIT CAST(COALESCE(:limit, 100) AS INTEGER)

recent_messages.title: Recent messages
recent_messages.sql: SELECT m.timestamp, m.session_id, s.agent, s.container_name, m.content FROM messages m JOIN sessions s ON s.id = m.session_id ORDER BY m.timestamp DESC LIMIT CAST(COALESCE(:limit, 200) AS INTEGER)

proxy.title: HTTP Proxy Logs
proxy.description: Captured HTTP request/response traffic from vibepod-proxy.

recent_requests.title: Recent proxied requests
recent_requests.sql: SELECT r.id AS request_id, r.timestamp, COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), NULLIF(r.source_container_id, ''), 'unknown') AS source_container, r.method, r.host, r.path, resp.status_code, resp.duration_ms, err.error_type FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN http_errors err ON err.request_id = r.id ORDER BY r.timestamp DESC LIMIT CAST(COALESCE(:limit, 200) AS INTEGER)

top_hosts.title: Top request hosts
top_hosts.sql: SELECT host, COUNT(*) AS request_count FROM http_requests WHERE host IS NOT NULL AND host != '' GROUP BY host ORDER BY request_count DESC LIMIT CAST(COALESCE(:limit, 50) AS INTEGER)

top_sources.title: Top source containers
top_sources.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(source_container_name, ''), NULLIF(source_container_id, ''), 'unknown') AS source_container, COUNT(*) AS request_count FROM http_requests GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(source_container_name, ''), NULLIF(source_container_id, ''), 'unknown') ORDER BY request_count DESC LIMIT CAST(COALESCE(:limit, 50) AS INTEGER)
